announce_text:
###SHIPNAME###, this is Third Fleet Command. Several months ago, your vessel was involved in Operation Tychon Tackle, a counter-insurgency mission against the CLF. Whilst the operation was a success, we are all aware that it proved a difficult mission, and your vessel still bears scars from the conflict.

Your next mission is payback. You are in orbit of LV-1021, an uncharted jungle world. Military intelligence has ascertained that this planet hosts a CLF training camp that was used to train the fighters you fought months ago.

Your objective is search and destroy, land on the planet, locate the camp, and eliminate any active hostiles.

A force reconnaissance squad, the Snake Eaters, has deployed ahead of you, expect a transmission from them shortly. 

Operation Falcon’s Fury is authorized.
